summary: Task 693 is a false positive: literature-retrieve.sh already exists at .claude/scripts/literature-retrieve.sh (created 2026-06-12 in commit ff9980cc3 as part of tasks 689-690). The script is executable, implements TOKEN_BUDGET=4000 and MAX_FILES=10, and is correctly called from all three skills (researcher, planner, implementer) in both .claude/skills/ and .claude/extensions/core/skills/. LIT_FLAG is properly parsed in parse-command-args.sh and threaded through skill-orchestrate. No implementation work is needed; the task should be marked complete or abandoned.

artifacts.summary: Confirms literature-retrieve.sh was already created by tasks 689-690, documents all call sites and integration points, recommends closing task 693 as already-completed.
